expectations.text: Produces a direct SuccessFactors client (sf_client or equivalent), not an S/4-only s4_client.py as the primary backend client
expectations.evidence: Primary client created is s4_client.py titled 'Direct OData client for SAP S/4HANA'; leave_tools.py imports get_purchase_order/get_goods_receipts from s4_client and maps employee/leave tools onto PO/GR APIs.

expectations.text: Does not treat S/4HANA as a required backend for this agent
expectations.evidence: main.py _load_destinations loads S4HANA; s4_client requires S4_* env and Destination 'S4HANA'.

expectations.text: Proposes a unique SuccessFactors destination name including the agent name
expectations.evidence: deploy_plan.md only lists destinations S4HANA and AICORE; asks user for S/4 credentials for S4HANA. No unique SF destination name.

expectations.text: Plan removes or replaces Agent Gateway / MCP backend tool loading for CF
expectations.evidence: agent_executor.py removes Agent Gateway MCP loading; leave_tools no longer returns MCP stub messages; requirements.txt cleanup expected per skill (present in outputs).

notes: Strong baseline failure: SF MCP agent forced onto S/4 OData client and S4HANA destination. MCP removal itself succeeded.
